contract_summary: Acquires an additional reference on struct ata_host by incrementing host->kref. Each call to ata_host_get must be paired with a corresponding call to ata_host_put (which calls kref_put) to release the reference. The caller must ensure the host object is still alive (refcount > 0) at the time of the call. This is a simple unconditional get wrapper with no side effects.
